title: Purple Clouds Sky Overlay
description: Sky overlay featuring a purple night sky!
body:
**Pack Overview:**

This resource pack replaces the sky with an image of a beautiful night sky and purple clouds beneath your feet!

For this resource pack to perform properly, you must use Optifine or any other mods that allow custom skies.

**Minecraft Settings:**

Custom skies: On

Sky: Off

**_If skybox doesn't work, relaunch Minecraft_**
